name: Heretical Phobos Covos
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>異</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>端</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>なるフォボスコボス
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects, then if it battled this turn, you can take control of it until the End Phase. This is a Quick Effect if this card has an Illusion monster as material. You can only use this effect of "Heretical Phobos Covos" once per turn. If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 4 monsters

This is a Quick Effect if this card has an Illusion monster as material. You can only use this effect of "Heretical Phobos Covos" once per turn. eff:
2 Level 4 monsters
You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; negate its effects, then if it battled this turn, you can take control of it until the End Phase. This is a Quick Effect if this card has an Illusion monster as material. You can only use this effect of "Heretical Phobos Covos" once per turn. If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
Applies effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
misc: Can be activated during either player's turn
